name: ZimSME AI Solutions
market: Zimbabwean SMEs and international small businesses that need websites, WhatsApp intake, AI quick wins, and launch support.
thesis: A Paperclip-operated service company can turn structured WhatsApp intake into fast website, automation, and business launch deliverables.
firstBuyer: Service businesses already selling through WhatsApp but lacking a credible website, lead capture, and follow-up system.
wedgeOffer: Starter Site plus WhatsApp lead-capture setup delivered from structured homework and a QA gate.

agents.title: CEO
agents.role: Owns strategy, priorities, pricing, and final decisions.

agents.title: Client Relations
agents.role: Qualifies leads, collects homework, enforces deposit-before-build, manages handoff.

agents.title: Project Operations
agents.role: Turns intake into delivery briefs, stage gates, and owner assignments.

agents.title: Website Delivery Engineer
agents.role: Builds deployable static sites from approved briefs and templates.

agents.title: AI Automation Expert
agents.role: Builds FAQ bots, lead capture flows, reminder systems, and workflow automations.

agents.title: QA Lead
agents.role: Checks mobile, forms, copy, assets, deployment readiness, and client handoff.

agents.title: Growth Lead
agents.role: Runs outreach, referrals, proof posts, and weekly pipeline reporting.

risks: Starting delivery before complete client homework.
Overpromising AI automation without fallback paths.
nextActions: Test Twilio sandbox intake into Paperclip task creation.
Publish offer page with package boundaries.

name: Paperclip Web Presence Factory
market: Small businesses worldwide that need premium static websites quickly without agency complexity.
thesis: A narrow AI-operated website factory can win by being faster, clearer, and more packaged than freelance chaos.
firstBuyer: Solo service businesses with outdated Facebook-only or WhatsApp-only presence.
wedgeOffer: 48-hour credibility site from guided intake, with WhatsApp CTA and deploy-ready ZIP.

agents.title: Copy Lead
agents.role: Turns rough notes into clear website copy.

agents.title: Launch QA
agents.role: Checks responsiveness, links, forms, images, and handoff.

name: Resilience Ops AI
market: Community groups, schools, clinics, and local councils that need emergency readiness operations.
thesis: A local-first resilience software and consulting company can sell setup, training, and maintenance around practical offline tools.
firstBuyer: Schools, churches, clinics, and NGOs with recurring outage, water, heat, or supply coordination problems.
wedgeOffer: Offline readiness kit: incident board, water safety sheet, supply tracker, print handoff, and staff training.

agents.title: Field Ops Lead
agents.role: Maps workflows, roles, readiness gaps, and training needs.

agents.title: Safety Reviewer
agents.role: Reviews health, disaster, water, and legal-adjacent claims.

agents.title: Local-first Builder
agents.role: Configures offline PWA modules and exports.

agents.title: Training Lead
agents.role: Creates drills, print sheets, and staff onboarding.

nextActions: Package existing MVPs into one kit.

name: WhatsApp Ops Studio
market: Businesses that run sales, support, appointments, and operations primarily through WhatsApp.
thesis: Most WhatsApp-heavy businesses do not need complex CRM first; they need intake, routing, reminders, templates, and follow-up discipline.
firstBuyer: Clinics, salons, tutors, repair shops, agencies, and small retailers drowning in repeated WhatsApp messages.
wedgeOffer: WhatsApp intake and follow-up kit with FAQ scripts, lead sheet, reminder templates, and optional Twilio sandbox bot.

agents.title: Intake Designer
agents.role: Maps conversation flows and required fields.

agents.title: Automation Builder
agents.role: Builds bot, sheet, CRM, or reminder integrations.

agents.title: Message Copywriter
agents.role: Writes replies, handoff scripts, and escalation messages.

agents.title: Conversation QA
agents.role: Tests flows, edge cases, and fallback paths.
